name: Fish & Seafood
description: Fresh perch, tilapia, catfish, cod, snapper, shrimp and more — hand-breaded and fried to order. Dinners come with fries, coleslaw, and bread.

items.name: Fried Catfish Dinner
items.description: Golden hand-breaded catfish fried fresh to order. Served with fries, coleslaw, and bread.
items.imageAlt: Golden fried catfish fillets with fries

items.name: Fried Perch Dinner
items.description: Crispy lake perch fillets, seasoned and fried until flaky. Served with fries, coleslaw, and bread.
items.imageAlt: Crispy fried perch fillets on a plate

items.name: Fried Tilapia Dinner
items.description: Mild, tender tilapia fillets breaded and fried golden. Served with fries, coleslaw, and bread.
items.imageAlt: Fried tilapia fillets with a golden crust

items.name: Fried Cod Dinner
items.description: Thick, flaky cod fillets fried to a crisp golden brown. Served with fries, coleslaw, and bread.

items.name: Fried Red Snapper Dinner
items.description: Whole seasoned red snapper, fried crisp and served hot. Served with fries, coleslaw, and bread.
items.imageAlt: Whole fried red snapper on a plate

items.name: Fried Shrimp Dinner
items.description: Lightly breaded shrimp fried until crispy and juicy. Served with fries, coleslaw, and bread.

items.name: Calamari
items.description: Tender calamari rings, lightly breaded and fried to a golden crunch.
items.imageAlt: Fried calamari rings with dipping sauce

items.name: Crab Cakes
items.description: Savory crab cakes, pan-fried crisp on the outside and tender inside.

items.name: Seafood Combo
items.description: A mix of catfish, shrimp, and your choice of fish. The best way to sample it all. Served with fries and bread.
items.imageAlt: Fried seafood platter with fish, shrimp, and fries

faqs.question: Is the fish fried fresh to order?
faqs.answer: Yes. Everything is hand-breaded and fried to order, so it comes out hot and crispy. We recommend calling ahead at (319) 221-1040 for faster service.

faqs.question: What comes with a seafood dinner?
faqs.answer: Our dinners come with fries, coleslaw, and bread. You can swap sides on request.

name: Chicken
description: Fried chicken, tenders, boneless bites, bone-in wings, and gizzards — crispy, juicy, and seasoned just right.

items.name: Fried Chicken (Legs & Thighs)
items.description: Classic bone-in fried chicken, seasoned and fried crispy. Juicy legs and thighs done right.

items.name: Chicken Tenders
items.description: Hand-breaded all-white-meat tenders, crispy outside and juicy inside. A kid and adult favorite.
items.imageAlt: Golden fried chicken tenders with dipping sauce

items.name: Boneless Chicken Bites
items.description: Bite-sized breaded chicken, fried crisp — toss them in your favorite wing sauce.

items.name: Bone-In Wings
items.description: Crispy bone-in wings fried to order. Plain or tossed in your choice of sauce. Dinners include fries, coleslaw, and bread.

items.name: Gizzards
items.description: Tender, perfectly seasoned chicken gizzards with a light breading and satisfying crunch. A local favorite.

items.name: Philly Chicken Sandwich
items.description: Griddled chicken with peppers, onions, and melted cheese on a toasted hoagie roll.

faqs.question: Are the wings bone-in or boneless?
faqs.answer: Our classic wings are bone-in. If you prefer boneless, try our Boneless Chicken Bites tossed in sauce.

faqs.question: Can I order wings by the bulk for a party?
faqs.answer: Absolutely — we do 20, 30, 50, and 100-piece orders. Call ahead at (319) 221-1040 for large orders.

name: Sides
description: Southern-style sides done right — from hush puppies to mac & cheese.

items.name: Hush Puppies
items.description: Golden fried cornmeal hush puppies — crispy outside, fluffy inside.

items.name: Breaded Mushrooms
items.description: Whole mushrooms hand-breaded and fried crisp. Great for sharing.

items.name: Cheese Curds
items.description: Battered Wisconsin-style cheese curds, fried until gooey and golden.

items.name: Onion Rings
items.description: Thick-cut onion rings in a crispy golden batter.

items.name: Fried Okra
items.description: Bite-sized okra, breaded and fried Southern-style.

items.name: Mac & Cheese
items.description: Creamy, cheesy macaroni — a comfort-food classic.

items.name: French Fries
items.description: Crispy, golden fries — perfect on their own or with any dinner.

items.name: Coleslaw
items.description: Creamy, tangy coleslaw that pairs perfectly with fried seafood and chicken.

faqs.question: What sides come with a dinner?
faqs.answer: Dinners come with fries, coleslaw, and bread. You can swap in another side on request.

faqs.question: Do you have vegetarian sides?
faqs.answer: Yes — fried okra, mushrooms, cheese curds, mac & cheese, fries, and coleslaw are all meat-free.

name: Desserts
description: Save room — our desserts are made to finish the meal right.

items.name: Banana Pudding
items.description: Classic Southern banana pudding with vanilla wafers and fresh banana.

items.name: Chocolate Cake
items.description: Rich, moist chocolate layer cake.
items.imageAlt: Slice of rich chocolate layer cake

items.name: Lemon Cake
items.description: Bright, sweet-tart lemon cake.

items.name: New York Cheesecake
items.description: Smooth, creamy New York-style cheesecake.

name: Drinks
description: Ice-cold beverages to wash it all down.

items.name: Fountain Drink
items.description: Coca-Cola, Diet Coke, Sprite, and more. Free refills with dine-in.
items.imageAlt: Fountain soft drink in a cup

items.name: Bottled Water
items.description: Refreshing bottled water.
